entries.reason: Care report list/search is a critical read path with bounded search and payload budgets.
Care report detail is a critical PHI/medical read path with delivery history and support metadata.
Prescriber institution suggestions feed report delivery and must stay narrow and stable.
Document delivery rule lookup feeds report sending and must stay scoped.
Patient overview base select must keep relation reads bounded and stable.
Patient movement timeline sources must stay caller-limit-aware and stable.
Medication stock summary is a critical bounded patient read path.
Inbound communication inbox is a critical PHI/medical list read path.
Inbound signal list is a critical PHI/medical list read path.
Visit schedule list route is a critical scheduling read entrypoint; heavy query shape is delegated to service watch follow-ups.
Visit preparation brief batch is a bounded visit read path and must keep id-in fan-in scoped.
